es.name: Un objeto misterioso
es.description: Su origen es desconocido. Dicen que apareció de la nada.

es.name: Una reliquia sin nombre
es.description: Nadie sabe de dónde viene esto. Quizás sea mejor así.

es.name: Algo curioso
es.description: Parece importante, pero nadie lo ha reclamado.

es.name: Un cachivache raro
es.description: Lo encontré por ahí tirado. ¿Será valioso?

es.name: Una cosita brillante
es.description: Brilla un poco. Solo un poco.

en.name: A mysterious object
en.description: Its origin is unknown. They say it appeared out of thin air.

en.name: A nameless relic
en.description: Nobody knows where this came from. Perhaps it's better that way.

en.name: Something curious
en.description: It looks important, but nobody has claimed it.

en.name: A weird thingamajig
en.description: Found it lying around. Could it be valuable?

en.name: A shiny little thing
en.description: It shines a little. Just a little.
